description: Lightweight static analysis for many languages. Find bug variants with patterns that look like source code.
license_name: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
commit_message:
feat(scan): add nosemgrep_disabled to scan_configuration (semgrep/semgrep-proprietary#6531)

Adds an optional `nosemgrep_disabled` bool to the `scan_configuration`
type so the platform can tell the CLI whether the org has disabled
`nosemgrep` inline ignore comments for a scan. Defaults to `false`, so
older CLIs ignore it and older servers that omit it are read as `false`.

Test plan:

No behavior change — interface-only addition. Bindings are regenerated
and consistent across `.atd`, `.jsonschem
